title: No Fogg
description: No Fog without optifine and no other mods !!!
body:
# 🧊 No Fogg Pack — Clear Vision, No Mods
Say goodbye to fog and explore your Minecraft world with total clarity! This texture pack removes all fog from every dimension — Overworld, Nether, and The End — without needing OptiFine or any other mods.

## 🔍 Features:
 
❌ No fog anywhere — super clear visibility
✅ Works in vanilla Minecraft — no OptiFine needed
💨 Lightweight and lag-free
🎮 Safe for servers and multiplayer
👀 Keeps original look — no weird textures, just better visibility


## ⚙️ How to Use:
 
Download from the curseforge.
Enter the game and activate the recourse pack
Play and enjoy :)

## 📌 Notes:
 
Compatible with versions 1.8 and all above
Works with most shaders, but some may re-add fog — check shader settings
You can use it with other resource packs too!
